notes: Comments identity/open-state core remains unchanged from accepted CC7.5.6.
Keeps gift flow/claim fixes from CC7.5.8.
Button flow now uses one active menu discipline: edit current menu when possible, track stale button menu IDs and delete them with retries.
Starting button flow resets stale channel/post/text/action data.
Choosing a post clears previous button text/action, so old values cannot accidentally save to a new post.
Final save is blocked until both button text and button action are present.
No overlay, no floating hints, no public/app.js override, no external code.run /app comments button.
